title: ballota hirsuta var. inermis
intro: Ballota hirsuta var. inermis, also known as the woolly betony, is a perennial plant in the mint family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of essential oils such as borneol and borneol acetate. The health benefits of woolly betony include relief from digestive issues, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Traditionally, woolly betony has been prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although its use may require further research and validation for its efficacy and safety.
